pos.label: POS Terminal
pos.changelog: Production wastage logging, menu pagination (20/page), compact category form, staff page cleanup, KOT fallback fix
whatsNew: 🗑 Wastage button — log spoilage, overcooked, dropped items during shift
📄 Menu now shows 20 items per page with page navigation
✏️ Category list is now compact and scrollable — no more long scroll
👥 Staff page cleaned up — removed unused Approval Limits section
🍳 Kitchen station routing no longer creates ghost 'Main Kitchen' after deploy
installGuide: 1. Close Plato POS completely (if open, right-click Taskbar → Close Window)
2. If POS does not close, open Task Manager → find 'Plato POS' → End Task
3. Run 'Plato-POS-Setup.exe' as Administrator (right-click → Run as administrator)
4. Click 'Yes' on the security prompt
5. Follow the installer steps — click Next, Next, Install
6. POS will open automatically after install
7. Log in with your cashier PIN — you are on v1.4.25

captain.label: Captain App
captain.changelog: Concurrent edit merge fix — local unsent items no longer lost on socket sync
whatsNew: 🔄 Orders no longer lose unsent items when another device updates the table
installGuide: 1. On Android, go to Settings → Security → Allow Install from Unknown Sources
2. Transfer 'plato-captain.apk' to your phone (WhatsApp, USB, or Google Drive)
3. Open the APK file on your phone and tap Install
4. If asked to uninstall old version first — tap Uninstall, then Install again
5. Open Captain App and enter your outlet code

kds.label: Kitchen Display
kds.changelog: Coloured source stripe, table-first card header, highlighted item notes, large-screen support
whatsNew: 🎨 Order source colour stripe (green = POS, blue = Captain, orange = Online)
📋 Table number shown first on each KOT card
📝 Item notes highlighted in yellow for easy reading
installGuide: 1. On Android tablet, go to Settings → Security → Allow Install from Unknown Sources
2. Transfer 'plato-kds.apk' to the tablet
3. Open the APK and tap Install
4. Open Kitchen Display and enter your outlet code
5. Select your kitchen station from the Settings tab

ownerWeb.label: Owner Dashboard
ownerWeb.changelog: Wastage report tab, menu pagination, staff page cleanup, credit collections in Payments tab
whatsNew: 🗑 New Wastage tab in Reports — see what was wasted, by item and reason
📄 Menu now paginates at 20 items — faster to load
👥 Staff page cleaner — removed unused sections
💳 Credit collections now show correctly in Payment Report
installGuide: No installation needed — Owner Dashboard updates automatically.
Just refresh your browser (Ctrl+R or Cmd+R) to get the latest version.

tabletPos.label: Tablet POS
tabletPos.changelog: Area override price pickup, concurrent edit merge fix
whatsNew: 💰 Area-specific prices now apply correctly (Rooftop, AC Hall, etc.)
🔄 Orders no longer lose unsent items on socket sync
installGuide: 1. On Android tablet, go to Settings → Security → Allow Install from Unknown Sources
2. Transfer the APK to the tablet
3. Uninstall the old Tablet POS first if prompted
4. Open the APK and tap Install
5. Open Tablet POS and enter your outlet code
